name: TimePicker
description: TimePickerItem (selectable time-slot list row, optional second time group + directional check-mark placement), TimePickerDuration (small duration pill, e.g. '30 min'), and TimePickerStatus (status pill with a colored dot — Available/Busy/In-meeting/Offline).
sourceNote: Figma's Default/Disabled variants of TimePickerItem/TimePickerDuration/TimePickerStatus render as plain non-interactive divs while Hover/Active/Selected render as buttons — a static-demo artifact, not real behavior. All three are implemented as genuine interactive <button>s with real :hover, disabled attribute, and a controlled active/selected prop, following this project's precedent (Checkbox, Radio, Switch) of favoring functional behavior with an optional `state` override for design-QA galleries. The Figma 'Check' asset (a small blue circle-checkmark) is substituted with RemixIcon's `checkbox-circle-fill`, per the RemixIcon-only policy. TimePickerStatus's 4 color mappings (success/error/warning/faded) reuse the exact same state tokens as Badge/StatusBadge.
